transcript.text:
[Spicy Rice Cake, Fishcakes, Pork Blood Sausages] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Hagfish and Pork Cheek Meat?] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[But is it just that?]
[I'm going to do a Candid Camera Prank!]
[Trying to change her voice]
[Let's do this right!]
[Jungwon Park (26)] [Newbie YouTuber]
[But if you eat that much...]
[They will know that it's...]
Tzuyang?
[Oops]
I think so
[How will this prank go?]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Giovanni Bosco Children's Welfare Center'] ['Korea Ginseng Corp' is with us to support small business owners this year.]
Hello everyone
Just in time for Lunar New Year,

I prepared not only New Year gifts, but also a prank for the small business owners
'Korea Ginseng Corp' sponsored me with their products, so that's what I will be giving out
I'm not sure if I will be much of a help, but I will do my best!
But... I'm not that great at acting
I wonder if I can pull the prank
I have someone here to help me today
-Hello~ -Hello!
[Who can it be?]
-Are you Jung Solbin, the person that emailed us? -Yes, that's me
[Emailed us with her story to participate in this video]
-How old are you? -I'm 17 years old
[Wait a minute...]
9 years younger than me lol
Let's go in the car since it's really cold
My grandfather enjoys watching your YouTube videos
I thought he would stop after a few, but he kept watching it

He's a subscriber!
He re-watches the videos too
His birthday is coming up soon
That's why I emailed you so that I can surprise him
-They run a restaurant, right? -Yes, my grandparents do
-What kind? -Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake) shop
I love it
My grandfather used to work at a car bodyshop when I was little
He slipped, fell, and got injured (cerebral hemorrhaging)
So he was hospitalized for 10 years
He opened up a small shop to make money for the family
How's the business doing?
Pretty decent, but a lot more slow days
[He comes out every day to run the restaurant even if he's not well]
[This is "Auntie's Bunsik" located in Gwanak-gu, Seoul]
-Do you go there often? -Yes, I go every weekend to help out

[What a beautiful soul]
How would you like to make them happy?
He's said before that he would be very happy to have you as his customer at his restaurant
I'm going to wear a hat And even change up my voice
Hello...
[Even more suspicious]
[Time to go]
[Practicing her very suspicious voice...]
[Let's go!]
Hello...
[What happened to the voice you were practicing?!]
[Her staff are already inside with the help of Solbin]
[Jungwon Park (26)] [Newbie YouTuber]
[Solbin putting up an act already]
1 tuna kimbap, 1 cheese ramyun noodles,
And 1 tteokboki (spicy rice cake)

Grandma, ramyun noodles
[Wait, I'm not done]
1 soondae (pork blood sausage),
1 fishcake,
1 order of tempura,
Also 1 anchovy broth with noodles [Are you even hiding your identity at this point?]
[That's a lot...]
Can I film the food?
-YouTuber? -Yes
[The red goodness has been served]
[Acting like a newbie YouTuber]
[Is she doing a mukbang?]
They give you a lot of fishcakes
Kimbap roll is this big
[No more space left here]
[PD sitting over here]

Can we trade seats, please?
[Picked the wrong table, oops]
[Much better]
[Wait a minute...]
[That much food...]
[And that voice...]
[Are you serious?!]
[This is all 100% real]
[Everything is out]
I'll start eating now
[Let's see...]
Delicious
[Sounds way too familiar]
[Increases the volume]
What is this~
[No really, what is this?]

Would you like me to bring warm soup?
[Refuses to speak]
[I've caught you]
She uses her chopsticks like Tzuyang
[I'm doomed]
Very similar way of using the chopsticks
[Ah...]
[I can just tell]
[Let's just eat for now]
[Is she not...?]
I think so...
Tzuyang has short hair though
[Confused by the hairstyle now]
Isn't she Tzuyang? The one on the TV right now
It's Tzuyang! She's not eating vegetables right now
[Just couldn't eat the veggies]

Right?!
[Prank over]
Hello
They're smiling
[Smiling real big]
How did you know? Hello
You just seemed like Tzuyang
Not at first though, right?
I didn't know
I had no idea either
PD: Your grand-daughter contacted us, that's what brought us here
[Breaks into tears]
[Because of her wonderful act]
I continuously watch your videos
I was shocked to see my videos on TV
I always have it playing

Then customers come and say "How does that person eat so much?!"
Thank you so much~
Your hair used to be shorter!
These are hair extensions
-I watch your YouTube videos every night -Really?
I've become a fan because of your act of kindness (charity, donations, etc) So thankful
I'll finish up the food first
[The irresistible red-goodness: Tteokboki]
[Also irresistible on cold chilly days: Fishcake skewers]
[With soondae to pair up these dishes]
They give you big portions overall
The roll is big
Never-ending amount of noodles
I got caught because of my hate for vegetables
I was pushing them aside
-I wanted to surprise you guys -I just knew from the way you use your chopsticks

You have to eat more than that This won't fill you up [She knows her too well]
This is really chunky
[Chunky]
Tzuyang, did you eat yet?
You have to eat even if you're busy!
[That timing haha]
[Joon is always worrying about you]
[Thanks for the cameo]
With some tteokboki sauce
Pig lungs I like these
That's very nice~
The pork intestines are cut in big sizes
The stomach
[She really is a good eater]
Very tasty
Tempura

These are big too
This fried vegetable is as big as my hand
That's so good
They hand-make these every morning
It's all handmade
So good
I had a great meal
I really think she has a great heart
[Compliment party]
She helps out on the weekends
She comes over on Friday night
Sleeps over until Sunday morning Just to help us out
-She does everything for us -You must be so proud
[Very proud]
I prepared a gift for the Lunar New Year It's Korean Red Ginseng
You didn't have to... You coming here is a gift itself

Here you go
So that you can take care of your health
He's been asking me to buy these for him
[Korean Red Ginseng: Cheon Nok S (deer antler velvet)]
[Manufacturing and sales from: Korea Ginseng Corp / This product is a general food, not a health functional food]
[Open it up!]
[Graded with New Zealand's grading system: The highest "SAT-grade" deer antlers]
["Korea Ginseng Corp" owns a total of 7 licenses regarding deer antlers alone]
[Made with not only the antlers but also other ingredients beneficial for seniors]
Thank you~
For you as well
[Shake it]
That's strong
It's giving me an energy boost
[Did I do well?]
I've never seen you smile this big before

[I love it]
[Me too!]
That's strong indeed
-I love you my grand-daughter -I love you!
[A hug that warms up the winter cold]
She also got accepted to a good school
Very grateful
-A good school? -A foreign high school
[A smart one too!]
I will be working hard as I watch you
We will give it all we got It will bring us good results in the end
[After spending a great time...]
[Who is she calling?]
-Hello -Hello, is this a good time for a call?
You will be a great help for my parents if you can come by
[Another email submission from a subscriber: Lee Sunjae]

[A restaurant that's been left quiet]
-We would have a waitlist on good days -We thought that would last forever
-1,200,000 Won a day? (~$1000 USD) -That was in 2017
Our worst day was 0 Won
Easily put, there's nothing that we can do but wait
We're just hanging in there...
"This too shall pass", "It's not just us",
"We're in this together"
"We're going to be okay" That's how we promise reassurance to our kids so that they don't worry
"Mom, how many tables did you serve today?" Is not something a kid should be asking
Just so proud and sorry at the same time to be going through so much at such a young age
[Our admirable daughter who has been waiting patiently]
Sunjae, thanks to you we're being broadcasted...
[Too overwhelmed to express his thankfulness to his daughter]
-Just say you're thankful -I keep thinking about the things I couldn't do for her
I think that's her She's running!

Hello!
-Sunjae, right? -Yes!
Hello
-Are your parents at the restaurant right now? -Yes they are
I brought some gifts for them
-Is it red ginseng? -Yes
They're going to love it
-Where is it? -Here
[This is "Happy Gogi House" located in Jangan-gu, Suwon]
[Let's head inside]
Mom, Tzuyang is here!
Wow, it's Tzuyang... (Shy)
-Gifts for you -Thank you
Red ginseng!
It's good for the fatigue body
[5 major functions of red ginseng, the main ingredient] [Improve fatigue-ness, improve immunity, improve memory, platelet aggregation blood flow through inhibition, and help with antioxidant]

Drink it with us
[Sharing is caring] I'm okay I'm okay~
I feel rejuvenated~!
All the tiredness is gone
That seems too "business"
[We love "Korea Ginseng Corporations"]
She has a good heart She shows with actions and not words
The best daughter I can ask for
[She's gotten teary-eyed]
I didn't want it to be like this
I want our family to be healthy and happy from now on
-I love you! -I love you too!
I want you to have a meal since you're here
Thank you, I will
[Freshly prepared upon order]
[Korea's Hagfish (eel)]

Is this it?
It's that really gross-looking thingie, right?
I'll never get used to this
[Much better]
These are called Hagfish
We catch and prepare on-order because our restaurant is pretty small
So it's very fresh and not fishy
It's ready now
Thank you~
Delicious!
I had hagfish recently and it was a bit fishy
This is not like that at all! It has a smoky flavor too
It's so good I love the crunchy texture
Chewy and crunchy
Can I try this?
This is the guts

That's so good
[With spicy sauce]
-Cook these too? -Yes, for a more smoky flavor
It's cooked, but this will make it even better
[The flavors are out of this world!]
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you
Let's try the spicy one
Wow
The best hagfish I ever had was in Gimhae city
I think this beats it It has zero fishiness
The texture is so good
This has got to be the best hagfish I ever had Really
I love the sauce The smokiness to it
Wow, so good
Sunjae, do you know how to eat these too?
-I haven't had much of it -Really?

How come? Do you not like it?
Because of how they look
[I understand]
Would you guys like to eat with me?
[Joined together]
[With pork cheek meat]
There are only 2 slices of this per pig
Wow, that's so rare!
I'm so nervous
You have so many fans
So I had no idea I would get picked
I just submitted it anyway
Thank you for coming
[All cooked and ready]
[Bon appetit]
That's so good

-Have you brought your friends here before? -Yes
Over here
[Her name on the wall]
My friend wrote that
We're so thankful to have you here
I wish you nothing but success in all that you do
I also wish our family to be healthy and happy this year
If I can wish for more,
I want everyone to be happy
I love it
The food is incredible I hope more people can come and show some love and support
And I'm also so happy for the Korean Red Ginseng
I will eat this and work even harder Thank you!
[It could have been easily overlooked,]
[But there are people who are silently...]
[working hard to keep us safe]

[This is Yang Cheon Volunteer Center affiliated with the Volunteer Center where Tzuyang participates]
[She packing gifts, but what is it?]
[Korea Red Ginseng: Everytime] [Functionality of the main ingredient Red Ginseng: it can help boost immunity]
Ta-da
The reason why I prepared these is because
I wanted to give out to the ones that are working hard in the cold winter
Even with all the risks, they provide assistance in multi-use facilities in need,
Recruit medical volunteers,
And for other volunteers that are related to this field
I want to take this great opportunity to partner up with 'Korea Ginseng Corp' to send a cheerful message with Lunar New Year gifts
I hope they like it!
[These volunteers work so hard for us]
[And even today, they are here to lend a helping hand]
When did you start doing this?
2006~2007ish
It's been a while

I started off as a bento box volunteer
To feed the elders
The elders always try to give back something as small as a cookie
That just really touched my heart
I just couldn't stop
Thank you so much
We will be sure to hand these out to all the volunteer workers
Don't lose hope,
Let's hang in there together and wait for the Spring
And we always welcome volunteers!
I hope everyone has a happy 2022!
Be happy!
[May everyone have a happy and warm 2022]
[I wish you all a Happy New Year]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Giovanni Bosco Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
